rules.title: Wetland restoration projects eligible when activities convert degraded wetlands to forest and meet small-scale thresholds.
rules.logic: Eligible lands are degraded wetlands converted to forest; aggregated area remains below the small-scale threshold and hydrological integrity is restored.

rules.title: Permanence buffer contributions determined via Tool 15 wetland risk factors.
rules.logic: Use Tool 15 wetland-specific risk scoring to set buffer share; adjust when management or climate risks change.

rules.title: Normative tools and references maintained for monitoring and verification teams.
rules.logic: Maintain accessible copies of UNFCCC tools referenced in methodology for all monitoring staff.

rules.title: Annualized carbon stock change derived from difference in pool carbon divided by measurement interval.
rules.logic: ΔC_year = (C_t2 - C_t1) / T applied to each pool prior to emission and leakage deductions.

rules.title: Annexes capture hydrology restoration evidence, training records, and community engagement notes.
rules.logic: Include hydrological restoration documentation, participant training logs, and engagement minutes in monitoring annexes.

rules.title: Definitions clarify wetland geomorphology, participant aggregation, and leakage belt concepts.
rules.logic: Methodology definitions specify hydrological units, participant roles, and leakage belt boundaries.

rules.title: Project boundary includes on-site hydrological interventions and relevant carbon pools except where justified.
rules.logic: Boundary encompasses project hydrological zones and carbon pools; excluded pools set to zero change in calculations.

rules.title: Baseline assumes continuation of pre-project wetland degradation with zero additional removals.
rules.logic: Baseline carbon stock change set to zero under conservative assumption of continued degradation without project intervention.

rules.title: Project removals calculated from pool carbon stock changes minus emissions from project operations.
rules.logic: Net project removals equal sum of pool-specific carbon changes minus emissions from fuel use, drainage pumps, and fertilizer application.

rules.title: Leakage from displaced wetland uses monitored and deducted using Tool 14 defaults.
rules.logic: Leakage emissions calculated from Tool 14 metrics applied to displaced wetland uses and deducted before credit issuance.

rules.title: Monitoring plan covers hydrology restoration, vegetation plots, and participant reporting.
rules.logic: Implement monitoring plan with hydrological gauges, vegetation plots (Tool 16 QA/QC), and participant compliance forms.

rules.title: Data tables specify default biomass factors, hydrological parameters, and monitoring records.
rules.logic: Maintain dataset for biomass expansion factors, drainage rates, and soil parameters; update when national values available.

rules.title: Uncertainty analysis follows Tool 12 with deductions when precision thresholds unmet.
rules.logic: Apply Tool 12 procedures combining sampling and model uncertainty; deduct when precision worse than ±10% at 90% confidence.
